phase_summary: The scorecard reads 3 supportive · 3 neutral · 2 headwind — net +1 — with real yields at 2.2% now joining the dollar above 101 in headwind and dollar strength holding Global M2 flat. Conviction steps down to weakening as BTC dominance near 55.8% keeps the dial in BTC Accumulation, just above the Alt Rotation line, into a data-heavy week led by Wednesday's ISM Manufacturing print and Thursday's June jobs report.
_score_note: score (0-100) sets the pointer position on the gradient bar. Matches macropulse.uk dialStates pointer values: Risk Off~8, Hold~33, BTC Accumulation~58, ALT Rotation~82, Take Profit~95.
_note: active_zone must match one of _zones exactly. The email renders a gradient bar (Sell→Hold→Buy BTC→Alt Season→Top) matching the website design.
